name: part_002
file: tmp_【 3D LIVE 】ゲストもたくさん❕重大告知アリ❕みんなで楽しも🍙💜💜【 #猫又おかゆ生誕祭2026 】 [rYpbqdD1oiQ]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu and Nakiri Ayame perform the song 'Devil janai mon'.
Nekomata Okayu and AZKi perform the song 'Zutto Issho!'.

subtitles.original:
ねえ あたし知ってるよ
君がひとり悔しがってんの 知ってるよ
subtitles.english:
Hey, I know.
I know you're regretting it all alone.

subtitles.original:
ズキュン ズキュン 高まるじゃん
君を推すことをやめない
subtitles.english:
My heart's pounding.
I won't stop supporting you.

subtitles.original:
ねえ あたしも知ってるよ
君はできる子 知ってるよ
subtitles.english:
Hey, I know too.
I know you can do it.

subtitles.original:
辛い時は 弱いくらいでちょうどいい
あたしそれですらも好きだよ
subtitles.english:
When times are tough, being weak is just fine.
I love even that part of you.

subtitles.original:
MWAH!! お願い 君が欲しいの
名前を呼んでよ
subtitles.english:
MWAH!! Please, I want you.
Call my name.

subtitles.original:
いつだって 会いに参上
君はひとりだ
subtitles.english:
I'll come see you anytime.
You're alone.

subtitles.original:
だから歌う ひとりじゃない
もういいでしょ
subtitles.english:
So I'll sing. You're not alone.
Isn't that enough?

subtitles.original: ソロプレイはおしまいなんだってば
subtitles.english: I'm telling you, solo play is over.

subtitles.original: 君が病めるときも
subtitles.english: Even when you're sick,

subtitles.original: あたしそばにいるわ
subtitles.english: I'll be by your side.

subtitles.original: いつも見守っているわ
subtitles.english: I'll always be watching over you.

subtitles.original: そうよ怖くないのよ
subtitles.english: Yes, don't be afraid.

subtitles.original:
MWAH!! お願い 君が欲しいの
慰めさせて
subtitles.english:
MWAH!! Please, I want you.
Let me comfort you.

subtitles.original:
SHAKE SHAKE 愛の才能で
泣いてくれなきゃ
subtitles.english:
SHAKE SHAKE With the talent of love,
if you don't cry...

subtitles.original:
困ってしまう 濡れていたい
ねぇいいでしょ
subtitles.english:
I'll be in trouble. I want to be wet,
isn't that okay?

subtitles.original: 舐めとって飲み干したいんだってば
subtitles.english:
I'm telling you, I want to lick it all up
and drink it down.

subtitles.original:
MWAH!! お願い 君が欲しいの
頼り散らして
subtitles.english:
MWAH!! Please, I want you.
Lean on me.

subtitles.original:
SHAKE UP! なんて最高ね
分けてくれなきゃ
subtitles.english:
SHAKE UP! It's the best, isn't it?
If you don't share it with me...

subtitles.original:
君の痛い 感じてたい
慰めてたい
subtitles.english:
I want to feel your pain.
I want to comfort you.

subtitles.original: 吸いとって救いたいんだってば
subtitles.english:
I'm telling you, I want to suck it all out
and save you.

subtitles.original:
ねえ あたし知ってるよ
君がひとり涙してんの
subtitles.english:
Hey, I know.
I know you're crying all alone.

subtitles.original:
知ってるよ ぐすぐすエコーを聴かせて
弱い子からいいんじゃない
subtitles.english:
I know. Let me hear your sniffling echoes.
Isn't it fine for a weak kid?

subtitles.original:
朝が来るまでイチャコら
もっと泣いたって
subtitles.english:
Flirting until morning comes.
Even if you cry more...

subtitles.original:
何度だって受け止めてあげる
もう我慢しないで出していこ
subtitles.english:
I'll accept you any number of times.
Don't hold back anymore, let it out.

subtitles.original: ってば そう
subtitles.english: I'm telling you, so...

subtitles.original:
自堕落の優等生
今宵も自分と密会で
subtitles.english:
Self-deprecating honor student.
Having a secret meeting with myself tonight too.

subtitles.original:
しんどいわ しんどいわ
ぱつらつらご唱和
subtitles.english:
It's tough, it's tough.
Join me in the chant.

subtitles.original:
本当は劣等生
あたしはあたしに不詳です
subtitles.english:
Actually a failure.
I'm unknown even to myself.

subtitles.original:
しんどいわ しんどいわ
もういやいや絶交
subtitles.english:
It's tough, it's tough.
No more, no more, breaking off ties.

subtitles.original:
シンバイミョウ シンバイミョウ
これは笑えるジョークさ
subtitles.english:
Deep mystery, deep mystery.
This is a funny joke.

subtitles.original:
シンマイドウ シンマイドウ
みんなおいでよポップさ
subtitles.english:
Deep truth, deep truth.
Everyone, come join the pop.

subtitles.original:
まあまあ それをお刺すよ
ただの噛み切りですよ
subtitles.english:
Well, well, I'll pierce that.
It's just a paper cut.

subtitles.original: いいから 早く箱 押せや
subtitles.english: Whatever, just press the box already.

subtitles.original:
デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん
あくまほどっさようなら
subtitles.english:
I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil!
Goodbye to the demons.

subtitles.original:
死んじゃった 死んじゃった
愛してほしいじゃん
subtitles.english:
I've died, I've died.
I want you to love me.

subtitles.original:
それでもハマっちゃうなら
それでも恋しちゃうなら
subtitles.english:
Even if you get hooked on it,
even if you fall in love...

subtitles.original:
死んじゃった 死んじゃった
エンジェル エンジェル
subtitles.english:
I've died, I've died.
Angel, angel.

subtitles.original: わあ! 悲報 悲報 悲報 悲報 悲報
subtitles.english: Whoa! Bad news, bad news...

subtitles.original: 汚いね
subtitles.english: It's dirty, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 飛べないね
subtitles.english: Can't fly, can't fly.

subtitles.original:
デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん
死んじゃった 死んじゃった
subtitles.english:
I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil!
I've died, I've died.

subtitles.original: 本当の天使 スルーしてご臨終
subtitles.english: Ignoring the real angel, it's the end.

subtitles.original: あくまで天使じゃん 最強じゃん
subtitles.english:
I'm just an angel, after all.
I'm the strongest, right?

subtitles.original: 君がためって名言の悪意 悪意
subtitles.english: The malice in the saying 'for your sake'...

subtitles.original: 夢が叶うって奪ったさらり さらり
subtitles.english: Quietly stolen away the 'dreams come true'...

subtitles.original:
高中毒性の高いものにゃ
贖うんだな
subtitles.english:
If it's highly addictive,
you've gotta pay the price.

subtitles.original: 魂抜かれちゃって やーねやーね
subtitles.english:
Soul's been snatched away.
How awful, how awful.

subtitles.original: 光り輝く若辺 この首が締まってく
subtitles.english: A shining youth, this neck is being tightened.

subtitles.original: 嘘をつけば緩んでく 言えないSOS
subtitles.english:
If I tell a lie, it loosens.
An unspoken SOS.

subtitles.original:
白いペンキ被りましょう
成り切ってしまいましょう
subtitles.english:
Let's cover ourselves in white paint.
Let's act the part completely.

subtitles.original: 嘘をつけば楽になる ほらやっちゃって
subtitles.english:
If you tell a lie, it gets easier.
Go on, just do it.

subtitles.original: デビルじゃない デビルじゃないもん
subtitles.english: I'm not a devil, I'm not a devil!

subtitles.original: 死んじゃった 死んじゃった ああ

Even if I doubt it,
even if I hate it...

Acting with a smile,
Angel, Angel.
